orgId.description: The organization to switch to: the `id` returned by `organizations-list` (a UUID-like string, not the organization name). Use `organizations-list` to resolve a name to its id.

id.description: Alias for `orgId`. Accepts the `id` returned by `organizations-list` / `organization-get`.

organizationId.description: Alias for `orgId`. Accepts the `id` returned by `organizations-list` / `organization-get`.

organization_id.description: Alias for `orgId`. Accepts the `id` returned by `organizations-list` / `organization-get`.

org_id.description: Alias for `orgId`. Accepts the `id` returned by `organizations-list` / `organization-get`.
